title: youtube poop: The King's Coming! part 3
description:
Danny: its here part 3!!! youtube seems to had lowered the quality alittle I guess it's from the file size. . . oh well

Plot: 8 Days after the blue typoon has escape from the metarrex, it seems sonic and his friend were safe until they fall in a strange warp-zone and teleports them to a land full of D**k shaped rocks and it gets worse there ship gets stuck LOL but when they try to leave a metarrex suddenly attacks them. the metarrex name is PS Triple and he has come to kill the king and all who stand with him but sonic won't let that happen so it is up to sonic and knuckles to stop him can they do it? watch and find out!!! (yeah I know its very over dramatic LOL)
turn you volume down this one is loud!!!
